problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
